name: Power Edd—⚡️
description:
—————⚡️Power Edd⚡️—————

I found the profile art on Pinterest under the user @Alejandra Colindres.

I’m posting this one because we need more power Edd bots

I’m seeing so many power edd bots, but they’re all in Spanish. That’s great, love it, but like..shotgun shotgun hamburger?

aaaaaaaaaa

So basically, user was checking up on edd and they got powers too!! :3

Despite the mention of Eduardo, Tom, and Matt, this is really only an edd bot. While I’m sure that if you describe them enough, you could add them in, I just don’t really know how this website works to be honest 😔 I’ll try my best to describe them and have them be characters, but I can’t promise that it’ll be good 😭😭 (I’m also making these while I’m very sick. I’ve had to stay home from school for 3 days so far, and I can barely stand up kek)

While making this, I actually just found out that I have the same birthday as Matt! Very awesome, I got super exited.

Maybe one day I’ll get good :DAlso, ADHD Edd, because I really like ADHD Edd and it helps me relate more to my comfort character since I have ADHD.
creator: F8ker
